title: branch — product analytics

events.name: Branch Created
events.description: New Branch provisioned. `created_via`: admin-ui / import / cli / provisioning-api.

events.name: Branch Closed
events.description: reason_kind: relocation / consolidation / lease-ended / underperformance / other. Free-form reason text is NOT included — internal-tier.

events.name: Branch Address Changed
events.description: `changed_fields_count` only — actual field names would leak intent.

events.name: Branch Coordinates Updated
events.description: `source`: manual / geocoded / imported. Feeds the map-usage dashboard.

events.name: Branch Capacity Changed
events.description: Bucketed (null / <=50 / 51-200 / 201-500 / 501+) rather than exact — exact capacity reveals venue size which is competitive-intel.

events.name: Branch Geocoded
events.description: outcome: success / low_quality / failed / unavailable. confidence_bucket: high (>=0.9) / medium (0.75-0.9) / low (<0.75).

events.name: Branch Force Closed by Platform
events.description: Support-tier action. Every use writes to activity log AND analytics for post-incident review.

notes: No PII in any Branch analytics event — Branch carries no personal data.
Reason free-form text is NEVER a Segment property — kept internal-tier in the audit trail.
`Coordinates` values (lat/lng) are NEVER a Segment property — competitive intelligence risk. Only `source` is exposed.
